creator: harrison.grundy@astrodoggroup.com
text:
There's now a bounty on getting this bug fixed. One Wandboard Quad to whoever fixes this issue (or whoever is credited in the commit with fixing this issue) and has it committed to -HEAD. The bounty is open to anyone I can legally send the Wandboard to from the US. Should multiple people be credited in the commit, we'll resolve it with a single game of "Pick a number" conducted via e-mail. Expect about a month from confirmation of the fix in head to the Wandboard being shipped out.

If you have any questions about the bounty, e-mail me at harrison.grundy <at> astrodogdoggroup <dot> com

Good luck!
